content: Investigation Summary: This case involves a complex property fraud centered on forgery, corruption, and possible homicide. Forensic evidence confirms the 2017 will is forged. The 2016 land record was altered by Debashish Mukherjee. Nandini Sen was on leave when the will was typed. Mrs. Ghosh was hospitalized and could not have witnessed the signing. Dr. Mehta’s involvement is passive — he was used to lend credibility. Financial trail shows Priya Chatterjee embezzled ₹12 lakh from her father’s account and transferred ₹8.5 lakh to Dubai. The death of Ramesh Das was homicide by curare poisoning. Boundary stones were illegally moved by Priya’s contractor. Evidence points to Priya Chatterjee as the principal architect of the fraud. Accomplices: Debashish Mukherjee (bribery), Nandini Sen (forged affidavit), and possibly Nandini Sen’s employer who falsified attendance records. Motive: Debt and desire to sell land to real estate developer for ₹4.2 crore. Recommendation: Charge sheet under IPC Sections 420 (cheating), 467 (forgery of valuable security), 468 (forgery for purpose of cheating), 302 (murder), 120B (criminal conspiracy), and Prevention of Corruption Act. Arrest warrants issued for Priya Chatterjee, Debashish Mukherjee. Nandini Sen is absconding. Dr. Mehta and Mrs. Ghosh are not criminally liable but their testimonies are unreliable.
